title: Senior Data Engineer
text: Build and maintain ETL pipelines in Python and Spark. Heavy use of Parquet on S3, Airflow orchestration, and dbt. You will own data quality for our lakehouse.

title: Backend Engineer (Rust)
text: Write high-throughput services in Rust. Postgres, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes. On-site in Austin three days a week.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
text: Train and serve PyTorch models. Python, pandas, GPU clusters. LLM fine-tuning experience a plus. Fully remote team.

title: Data Platform Engineer
text: Own the data platform: Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, Parquet ingestion from S3. Python and SQL daily. Terraform for infra.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
text: Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS, Go. Keep production reliable. PagerDuty on-call rotation. On-site SF.

title: Junior Python Developer
text: Entry-level Python role. Flask, Postgres, basic SQL. Mentorship provided. Remote-first.

title: Analytics Engineer
text: dbt, Snowflake, SQL, Python. Build trustworthy metrics for the business. Hybrid in NYC.

title: Staff Software Engineer, Infra
text: Lead infrastructure: Kubernetes, Go, Terraform, GCP. Build internal platforms used by 200+ engineers. Remote.

title: Data Scientist
text: Python, pandas, statistics, experimentation. Build models and dashboards. On-site Boston.

title: DevOps Engineer
text: CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, bash and Python automation. Terraform IaC. Remote with quarterly meetups.

title: Database Administrator
text: PostgreSQL and MySQL administration, performance tuning, backups. SQL deep expertise. On-site Chicago.

title: Big Data Engineer
text: Spark, Kafka, Parquet, S3, Airflow. Process petabytes. Python and Scala. Fully remote.

title: Full Stack Engineer
text: React, Node, Postgres. Some Python services. Hybrid Seattle. Product-focused team.

title: Platform SRE
text: Go, Kubernetes, Terraform, GCP, observability with Prometheus. Distributed team across timezones.

title: ETL Developer
text: Build ETL with Python, SQL, and Airflow. Load into Snowflake. Some Parquet handling. On-site Dallas.
